REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2434 20th Ave., San Francisco, Ca 94116)
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Geoffrey Wiggs appeared in person for Susan Kotta-Wait (petitioner).
Victor Quan Realtor appeared in person for and with Noel Fahey and Sharon Heagney (buyers).

The sale was confirmed at $1,528,850.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed (date). The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. Order under submission with the intent to grant. Parties to submit a revised order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
